data.description: Thailand: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has officially lifted the state of emergency in Songkhla Province, effective 5 December, following the recent floods.

data.title: UNESCO partners with Walnut Coding for digital education, aiming to equip youth with future skills.
data.description: A new collaboration signed on December 4, 2025 in Beijing between UNESCO and Walnut Coding, a prominent digital education platform for youth, is set to address the digital divide and provide essential skills to young learners worldwide. The partnership seeks to enhance initiatives that prepare young individuals for the future, supporting the development of technology-related capabilities. UNESCO and Walnut Coding aim to contribute significantly to bridging the gap in access to digital resources and education, with a focus on equipping youths with the necessary tools for success. This collaboration marks a significant step towards ensuring that more young learners are equipped with vital skills for the evolving digital landscape.

data.title: WSPN upgrades global payment system, now supports multiple currencies and stablecoins, enhancing infrastructure.
data.description: The Global Payment infrastructure upgrade by Worldwide Stablecoin Payment Network (WSPN) based in Tortola, British Virgin Islands, was finalized on Dec. 4, 2025. The network has introduced a robust payment orchestration layer accommodating various currencies and stablecoins. This upgrade aims to enhance the efficiency of transactions on a global scale.

data.title: Norway halts deep-sea mining plans until 2029 due to political pressure. Previously planned 386 exploration blocks will not be issued licenses.
data.description: In a notable policy shift following political pressure, Norway has decided to postpone its deep-sea mining plans. The government, under a new budget agreement with opposition parties, agreed to halt the issuance of any deep-sea mining licenses in Norwegian waters until at least 2029. This decision marks a significant departure from the previous stance taken just last year when lawmakers approved the opening of a vast offshore area for mineral exploration. Initially planning to grant exploration licenses for 386 offshore blocks covering 280,000 square kilometers, Oslo intended to offer a new supply of essential minerals like copper, nickel, and manganese. These minerals play a crucial role in industries such as batteries, renewable energy, and defense technologies. However, mounting opposition from environmental groups, scientists, and opposition parties, citing the potential risks to poorly understood and fragile deep-sea ecosystems, led to this policy reversal. This move is seen as a historic victory by critics of deep-sea mining initiatives.

data.title: TITAN Group strengthens solutions for data centers with high-performance materials, focusing on sustainable construction.
data.description: TITAN Group, listed on the Brussels stock exchange as TITC, is enhancing its offerings for data centers by providing high-performance, eco-friendly materials. This move aims to support the swift growth of digital infrastructure in Europe and the US. The company, known for its sustainable construction practices, is amplifying its presence by introducing TITAN Edge products, notably Velter™ in Greece. Additionally, it is introducing a variety of advanced cement and ready-mix concrete solutions in the US to cater to the evolving market demand.

data.title: In 2025, CoinDCX report reveals Indian users diversifying into wider crypto holdings as Sumit Gupta highlights growing acceptance in investment world.
data.description: Sumit Gupta of CoinDCX noted that cryptocurrency is increasingly being seen as a seamless addition to conventional investment avenues by traders in India, signifying a growing maturity in their approach.

data.title: Alarm.com and Everon partner to offer integrated security solutions for businesses, with focus on intrusion protection and remote monitoring.
data.description: A collaboration has been established between Alarm.com and Everon, LLC in Tysons, Va. and Irving, Texas. Alarm.com (Nasdaq: ALRM) has partnered with Everon, a prominent security integrator and provider of commercial security solutions, to introduce a unified console for Everon clients. This combines intrusion protection, access control, remote video monitoring, and business management solutions. This move responds to the rising need for integrated commercial security platforms.

data.title: Bitcoin whales added over 45,000 BTC in a week, the 2nd largest in 2025, possibly signaling a bullish trend ahead for BTC.Trading around $93,000, Bitcoin rebounded 7% on December 3 after a dip to $86,000.Bloomberg data indicates 1,000 individuals control 40% of all Bitcoin, impacting market trends.
data.description: Bitcoin whales, large holders of BTC, have been accumulating the cryptocurrency amid recent market instability, adding over 45,000 BTC in the past week. This is the second largest weekly accumulation in 2025. The on-chain data indicates that wallets holding 1,000 BTC or more collected 45,000 coins between late November and early December. This accumulation hints at a potential rally in Q1 2026, with Bitcoin trading around $93,000. Whale accumulation historically foreshadows Bitcoin price movements, tightening the supply on exchanges and setting a price floor for future rallies. Around 1,000 individuals control 40% of all Bitcoin, making their actions significant. The article suggests that the whales' recent actions could lead to future price increases.

data.title: Euna Budget wins Gold for "Best of Category" at 2025 Globee Awards, celebrates impact on public sector with purpose-built software.
data.description: Euna Solutions®, a top provider of specialized cloud solutions for the public sector, disclosed today that Euna Budget has secured the prestigious Gold 2025 Globee® Award for Best Budgeting and Forecasting Software at the 18th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards for Impact. Recognizing organizations driving positive change through purposeful leadership, social responsibility, innovation, and sustainable practices, this global awards program has acknowledged Euna Budget as a standout product in its category.

data.title: Appcast's whitepaper on top 2026 recruiting trends, released annually for talent leaders. Source: PRNewswire, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Appcast, a top recruitment marketing platform driven by programmatic technology, releases an annual whitepaper forecasting upcoming hiring trends. Thousands of talent acquisition leaders rely on this trusted source for industry insights. The latest whitepaper, released on December 4, 2025, in Lebanon, New Hampshire, addresses the anticipated recruiting trends for the upcoming year. This report is a valuable resource for professionals navigating the evolving landscape of talent acquisition.

data.title: My Talking Angela 2 sees 1.5m downloads and 500k+ social media engagements in first week after Miraculous crossover.
data.description: After the Thanksgiving Day release of the Miraculous crossover, My Talking Angela 2 experienced a surge in downloads, with a total of 1.5 million installations, and garnered over 500,000 engagements on various social media platforms within its initial week. In a press release dated December 4, 2025, Outfit7 highlighted the success of the game as it continues to gain traction.

data.title: YOSHIKI donates $100,000 for Thailand and Indonesia flood relief, split equally between Red Cross Thailand and Red Cross Indonesia.
data.description: Renowned musician YOSHIKI made a generous contribution of $100,000 via Yoshiki Foundation America 501(c)(3) to aid victims of severe floods in Southeast Asia. The donation was split evenly, with $50,000 allocated to the Red Cross Thailand and $50,000 to the Red Cross Indonesia. The support was delivered promptly following the disaster.

data.title: Paradigm Health secures $78M Series B funding to integrate clinical trials into routine care globally. Led by ARCH Venture Partners.
data.description: An announcement was made today by Paradigm Health, a technology company based in Columbus, Ohio and New York, revealing an oversubscribed $78 million Series B financing. The funding round was primarily backed by ARCH Venture Partners, with additional participation from new investors. This financial boost signifies a significant milestone for Paradigm Health as they continue to enhance and modernize the clinical research ecosystem.
USTR: Trump could withdraw from USMCA next year - Politico

data.title: Triton Digital and Omny Studio launch video podcasting for digital storytelling, expands platform capabilities.
data.description: In a recent announcement made in New York, Triton Digital® unveiled a major enhancement to Omny Studio, their platform catering to the digital audio, podcast, and broadcast radio sectors. This update introduces extensive support for video podcasting, enabling publishers to produce, oversee, share, and monetize audio and video content through a unified platform. By integrating video capabilities into Triton’s array of services including publishing, analytics, and monetization, users now have a comprehensive solution at their disposal.

data.title: Contrast Security and Datadog partner to integrate verified application threat detection in Datadog Cloud SIEM. Helps SOCs cut MTTR by distinguishing real exploits.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, Contrast Security, a prominent leader in Application Detection and Response (ADR), has collaborated with Datadog to introduce a new integration. This collaboration paves the way for verified application runtime intelligence to be seamlessly incorporated into Datadog Cloud SIEM. The integration caters to Security Operations Centers (SOCs), equipping them with the ability to differentiate genuine application-layer exploits from irrelevant background distractions and effectively thwart these attacks. The objective is to aid security teams in reducing Mean Time to Respond (MTTR) as they grapple with the challenge of navigating through a sea of noisy alerts.
